pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh lines 18, 40-47 - Location is created in setup with this exact name
Task description, verifier.py lines 85,93; Web search confirms these are standard OpenMRS/Bahmni location tags for controlling login screen visibility and visit assignment

task_utils.sh lines 7,9: BAHMNI_BASE_URL=https://localhost, OPENMRS_BASE_URL=${BAHMNI_BASE_URL}/openmrs. The '/admin' path is not explicitly used in code; OpenMRS admin interface is accessed via web UI navigation, not API path.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring Bahmni/OpenMRS, an open-source healthcare EMR system. A new location called 'Telemedicine Wing' must be tagged with 'Login Location' (to appear on the login screen) and 'Visit Location' (to allow patient visits). The location is initially created without these tags in the setup phase. Administrator login uses credentials: username 'superman', password 'Admin123'. The OpenMRS base URL is https://localhost/openmrs. Location tags are modified via the OpenMRS REST API at /ws/rest/v1/location endpoints.
